Once upon a time there was a little cat named Mia.
Mia liked to play with a red ball in the warm sun.
One day the ball rolled into the tall grass and was gone.
Mia looked and looked until she found it under a leaf.
She was so happy that she ran home to show her mom.
<|endoftext|>
Tom and Anna went to the big park on a sunny day.
They saw a brave dog running after a bright kite.
The kite flew up high and got stuck in a green tree.
Tom climbed up and gave the kite back to the kind girl.
Everyone smiled and said thank you to the helpful boy.
<|endoftext|>
There was a small bird who could not fly very well.
Every morning the bird tried to jump from the old fence.
A wise owl told the bird to flap its wings more slowly.
The little bird tried again and rose into the blue sky.
It sang a happy song as it flew over the quiet lake.
<|endoftext|>
Lily found a shiny key under a soft blue blanket.
She did not know which door the little key would open.
She tried the box, the gate, and the tiny toy chest.
At last the key opened a music box that played a tune.
Lily danced around the room until the sleepy moon rose.
<|endoftext|>
